summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Harver Technologies landing page redesign. All backend APIs and frontend features are fully functional with perfect integration. Industrial aesthetic with orange accent color (#FF3B00) and dark background successfully implemented.
passed_tests: Technologies API returning 30 technologies (GET /api/technologies) - All categories and structure validated
Contact form submission (POST /api/contact) - Full integration working
Contact form validation with invalid data - Proper error handling
Hero section with industrial background image and tagline 'Energy Harvested. Intelligence Amplified.'
Navigation header with all required links (Expertise, Technologies, History, Leadership, Contact)
Stats section with animated counters ($2.8B, 214+ Patents, 14 Countries, 1,850 Employees)
Technologies grid with 30 technology cards loaded from backend API
Technology category filters (all, core, connectivity, data, industrial, experience, etc.)
Technology card modal functionality (open/close) - Perfect interaction
Timeline section with all milestones (2012-2026) - Complete company history
Leadership section with 3 executives and real photos from Unsplash/Pexels
Contact form with all required fields and proper validation
Contact form submission with success message display
Frontend-backend integration for all API endpoints
Industrial/classy design theme with orange (#FF3B00) accent color
